products.body_html:
Enhance your skincare routine with our high-quality cosmetic derma roller. Designed for gentle use, it helps improve the absorption of serums and promotes a smoother-looking skin texture.

Features:

  • Available in 0.5mm micro-needles (safe for home use)

Roll slowly and gently over clean skin in multiple directions. Use 1-2 times per week. Always disinfect before and after use.

Important Notice:

This product is for cosmetic use only. It does not replace any medical treatment or professional care. Not suitable for use on irritated or broken skin.

Visibility and Communication

Being transparent, it allows full visibility of the face, facilitating communication with clients. Facial expressions are important to reassure clients and provide personalized service.

Protection

It protects against splashes of chemicals, nail dust, and other particles that may be present during beauty services. This provides an additional barrier without obstructing the view.

Comfort

The adjustable elastics ensure a comfortable fit during long work sessions, which is essential for professionals who spend several hours standing and interacting with clients.

Hygiene

Easy to clean, this mask can be reused, making it practical and economical for beauty professionals.

16 PCS Semi-Cured Gel Nail Wraps | BSG 0193
products.body_html:
How to Use:

  1. Smooth and exfoliate: Smooth the nails with a nail file and exfoliate the dead skin around the nails.
  2. Clean: Clean the surface of the nails with an alcohol pad and keep them dry.
  3. Choose size: Choose the right size that fits your nails, peel off the protective films of the gel nail.
  4. Apply: Place the gel nail on your finger nails gently.
  5. Press edges: Use a small wood stick to press and flatten the edges of the nails.
  6. Remove excess: Remove the excess gel nail with a nail file.
  7. Cure: Cure the gel nails for 60 seconds to make them stronger, harder, and more glossy.
  8. Finish: Done! Your nails are bright and shining!
tags: Gel Nail Wraps for Hand Nails

products.title: SUN X20 UV LED Nail Lamp | 72 LED | 320W
products.body_html:
Revolutionize your manicure experience with the SUN X20 UV LED Nail Lamp 320W. Designed for both professionals and nail art enthusiasts, this high-power lamp ensures fast, efficient drying with advanced features and ergonomic design.

Key Features

  • 72 UV/LED Light Beads: Provides full and uniform coverage for quick and effective gel polish curing.
  • 320W Power: Delivers unparalleled drying performance, significantly reducing curing time for UV and LED gels.
  • Large LCD Screen: Displays real-time countdown for easy tracking of curing time.
  • Four Timer Settings: Choose from 10s, 30s, 60s, and 99s for precise control based on gel type.
  • Automatic Infrared Sensor: Automatically turns the lamp on when you place your hand inside and off when you remove it, offering hands-free convenience.
  • Spacious and Ergonomic Design: Accommodates both hands or feet, ideal for professional and personal use.
  • High-Quality Materials: Durable and long-lasting, ensuring no blackening of hands.

Benefits

  • Professional Efficiency at Home: Achieve salon-quality results at home with this powerful and versatile lamp.
  • Time-Saving: Advanced UV/LED technology drastically reduces curing time.
  • User-Friendly: Automatic sensors and multiple timer settings make it intuitive and easy to use.
  • Durable Results: Ensures long-lasting and glossy nails with every use, perfect for both beginners and experts.

Technical Specifications

  • Dual Light Source: 365nm + 405nm LEDs
  • Power: 320W (MAX)
  • Adapter: Rated input 100-240V, 50/60Hz
  • Dimensions: 230mm x 200mm x 105mm

 

⚠️ Warning – Safety

Never look directly at the UV LED lamp while it is on. This lamp emits UV-A rays (long wavelength) which can damage the retina and eyes upon direct or repeated exposure. Keep out of reach of children. For prolonged use, wear UV-protective glasses.

products.title: Professional UV LED Nail Lamp with Foldable Stand
products.body_html:
Enhance your manicure with our Professional UV LED Nail Lamp. Perfect for home or salon use, this lamp offers exceptional flexibility and efficiency.

Features:

  • Foldable Stand: Keeps the lamp stable and allows angle adjustment to free your hands.   
  • Quick Drying: Cures gel polish in 8 seconds and top coat in 12 seconds.
  • Usage Scope: Ideal for all gel manicures, especially for single nail curing and detailed nail art.
  • Portable: Measuring 12.3 cm x 7 cm x 2.3 cm with a 180 mAh battery, it is lightweight, compact, and features a USB interface, perfect for travel. 
  • Flexible Design: 360-degree rotating stand for curing nails from any angle.

Included in the Package: 

  • 1 x UV LED Nail Lamp
  • 1 x Foldable Stand
  • 1 x USB Cable
  • 1 x User Manual

products.title: 20 PCS Semi-Cured Gel Nail Wraps | BSS 0173
products.body_html:
How to Use:

  1. Smooth and exfoliate: Smooth the nails with a nail file and exfoliate the dead skin around the nails.
  2. Clean: Clean the surface of the nails with an alcohol pad and keep them dry.
  3. Choose size: Choose the right size that fits your nails, peel off the protective films of the gel nail.
  4. Apply: Place the gel nail on your finger nails gently.
  5. Press edges: Use a small wood stick to press and flatten the edges of the nails.
  6. Remove excess: Remove the excess gel nail with a nail file.
  7. Cure: Cure the gel nails for 60 seconds to make them stronger, harder, and more glossy.
  8. Finish: Done! Your nails are bright and shining!
tags: Gel Nail Wraps for Hand Nails

  1. Smooth and exfoliate: Smooth the nails with a nail file and exfoliate the dead skin around the nails.

products.title: SUN X21 UV LED Nail Lamp | 72 LED | 320W
products.body_html:
SUN X21 UV LED Nail Lamp 320W

Product Description

Revolutionize your manicure experience with the SUN X21 UV LED Nail Lamp 320W. Designed for both professionals and nail art enthusiasts, this high-power lamp ensures fast, efficient drying with advanced features and ergonomic design.

Key Features

  • 72 UV/LED Light Beads: Provides full and uniform coverage for quick and effective gel polish curing.
  • 320W Power: Delivers unparalleled drying performance, significantly reducing curing time for UV and LED gels.
  • Large LCD Screen: Displays real-time countdown for easy tracking of curing time.
  • Four Timer Settings: Choose from 10s, 30s, 60s, and 99s for precise control based on gel type.
  • Automatic Infrared Sensor: Automatically turns the lamp on when you place your hand inside and off when you remove it, offering hands-free convenience.
  • Spacious and Ergonomic Design: Accommodates both hands or feet, ideal for professional and personal use.
  • High-Quality Materials: Durable and long-lasting, ensuring no blackening of hands.

Benefits

  • Professional Efficiency at Home: Achieve salon-quality results at home with this powerful and versatile lamp.
  • Time-Saving: Advanced UV/LED technology drastically reduces curing time.
  • User-Friendly: Automatic sensors and multiple timer settings make it intuitive and easy to use.
  • Durable Results: Ensures long-lasting and glossy nails with every use, perfect for both beginners and experts.

Technical Specifications

  • Dual Light Source: 365nm + 405nm LEDs
  • Power: 320W (MAX)
  • Adapter: Rated input 100-240V, 50/60Hz
  • Dimensions: 230mm x 200mm x 105mm

⚠️ Warning – Safety

Never look directly at the UV LED lamp while it is on. This lamp emits UV-A rays (long wavelength) which can damage the retina and eyes upon direct or repeated exposure. Keep out of reach of children. For prolonged use, wear UV-protective glasses.

products.title: Hydro Jelly Mask 650g | Vampire PLLA Infusion | Anti-Aging & Brightening
products.body_html:
Rejuvenate your skin and boost collagen production with the Vampire PLLA Infusion Hydro Jelly Mask. This advanced formula is designed to increase collagen levels, improve skin elasticity, and deliver intense hydration for a youthful, glowing complexion.

Ingredients:

Potassium Alginate, Algin, Rice Flour, Sodium Hyaluronate, Oat Flour, Glucose, Collagen, Poly-L-Lactic Acid (PLLA), Pectin, Calcium Sulfate, Diatomaceous Earth, Sodium Chloride, Magnesium Sulfate, Potassium Chloride, Cellulose Gum, Mannitol, Carmine, Coolant, Essence, Corn Starch.

Caution:

For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Do not dispose of mask or pieces down the drain. Store in a cool, dry place.

Direction:

Mix 1 1/2 scoops of powder with 1 scoop of water (adjust water amount to get desired consistency). Mix quickly and spread evenly over face and neck. After 15-20 minutes, peel off to remove.

Net Weight: 650g
